---
title: "Contact me"
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.contact}
## Contact me

Email: tomas.diviak\[at\]manchester.ac.uk

[![](img/RG_icon.svg){.social-icon alt="ResearchGate"}](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tomas_Diviak){target="_blank"}
[![](img/github.svg){.social-icon alt="GitHub"}](https://github.com/tomasdiviak){target="_blank"}
:::
